steps.title: Set up the profit equation
steps.content:
Let $n$ be the number of tables. Revenue is $18n$, expenses are $144$, and profit is $504$:
$$504=18n-144$$

steps.title: Solve for the table count
steps.content:
Add $144$ to both sides and divide by $18$:
$$648=18n$$
$$n=36$$
The answer is D.
